steps.title: Use the context
steps.content: The motorman is chafing in his box, thinking of the drudging lot of the laboring man. He registered discontent — meaning he showed his discontent (it was visible on him).

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Displayed = showed outwardly. Perfect fit.

"Enrolled" (signed up) doesn't apply to feelings; "valued" reverses the meaning; "disregarded" means ignored — opposite of feeling discontent visibly.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
